de.uka.ilkd.key.control.instantiation_model

    • Constructor Detail

      • TacletFindModel

        public TacletFindModel(TacletApp app,
                       Services services,
                       NamespaceSet nss,
                       AbbrevMap scm,
                       Goal goal)
        Create new data model for tree.
        Parameters:
        app - the TacletApp where to get the necessary entries
        services - services.
        nss - universal namespace of variables, minimum for input in a row.
        scm - the abbreviation map.
        goal - the current goal.
